description: You are an allergist-immunologist preparing a chest CT series for a clinical presentation on airway remodeling in severe asthma. Due to a PACS migration error, the DICOM directory at /home/ga/DICOM/studies/airway_series/ contains contaminating MRI brain scan files. Relocate all non-CT files to /home/ga/DICOM/quarantine/ and ensure only legitimate CT files from the same study remain in the source directory. Document the number of contaminating files found, their modality/patient information, and the consistency of the remaining files in a report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/contamination_report.txt.

metadata.clinical_scenario: Series contamination cleanup for clinical presentation

injected_contaminants.source: MR brain scan files mixed into CT chest directory
injected_contaminants.distinguishing_features: Different Modality tag (MR vs CT), different PatientName/ID, different StudyDescription
